---
title: "9th 50K Long Run: Redmond Library to the Seattle Office"
description: "31.12 miles, two McDonald's pit stops, ended at the office with a hot shower."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-11-09"
categories: [running, ultra, long run, video, personal, seattle]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Watch the run on YouTube. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/1qYoJTth6hU)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Sharing my 9th 50K run (since 2024) this LongRunSunday: from Redmond library to our office building in Seattle! 31.12mi, moving time 5:06:22 pace 9'51"/mi. Stopped at 10mi and 20mi for McDonald's coffee & apple pie, and ended the run in office. Took a hot shower and then bus home!

[Watch the run →](https://youtu.be/1qYoJTth6hU)


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_running-longrunsunday-activity-7393527654643089408-VhTh).*
